footer_desc: Web development, PWA apps and digital solutions from Argentina.
hero_subtitulo: I turn ideas into digital products that work, scale and deliver results.
servicios_subtitulo: From websites to progressive apps. Every project built with attention to detail and focused on results.
servicio_01_desc: Custom, responsive and optimized websites. From landing pages to full platforms, focused on performance and great user experience.
servicio_02_desc: Progressive web apps that feel native. Install from the browser, work offline and load fast.
servicio_03_desc: Complete UI/UX design. Clear navigation, well-organized content and a site that turns visitors into clients.
servicio_04_desc: Custom components that integrate into your site. Aligned with your brand, built to be reusable and easy to maintain.
servicio_05_desc: I improve your search engine ranking with technical SEO, on-page optimization, load speed and indexing best practices.
servicio_06_desc: Your site always updated, secure and running. Updates, monitoring and technical support so you don't have to worry.
servicio_07_desc: Secure and reliable hosting so your site is available 24/7. Scalable solutions that grow with your project.
servicio_08_desc: I improve your current site's performance. Image optimization, code, load times and overall user experience.
stack_intro: My tech stack is at the core of every project. Each tool is chosen to build robust, tailored solutions. Click any icon to see how it benefits your project.
stack_javascript_desc: JavaScript makes your site dynamic and interactive, improving functionality and the experience of every user who visits.
stack_pwa_desc: Progressive web apps make your site work like a native app, improving accessibility and ease of use.
stack_vite_desc: Vite speeds up development times, allowing faster updates and continuous improvement of your site.
stack_git_desc: Git enables efficient code version management, meaning fewer errors and a more stable platform.
stack_sass_desc: Sass handles complex styles efficiently, resulting in cleaner web design that's easier to maintain.
stack_tailwind_desc: Tailwind CSS lets you quickly customize your site's design, ensuring it's unique and visually appealing.
stack_react_desc: React builds highly interactive interfaces, ensuring your site is fast and responds well to every user interaction.
stack_firebase_desc: Firebase provides a secure and scalable platform for your apps, protecting your data and ensuring smooth operation.
stack_css_desc: CSS makes your site look professional and polished, ensuring a pleasant and consistent visual experience across all browsers.
stack_github_desc: GitHub enables professional code collaboration and versioning, ensuring quality, traceability and continuous improvement.
stack_hostinger_desc: Hostinger provides fast and reliable hosting solutions, ensuring your site is always available and loads quickly.
stack_photoshop_desc: Photoshop creates high-quality graphics, ensuring your site's visual presentation is always attractive and professional.
stack_negocio_desc: MyNegocio powers your online business management, enabling faster and more secure transactions for your clients.
stack_ads_desc: Google Ads targets your services to users who need them most, ensuring they find your offers at the right time.
stack_meta_ads_desc: Meta Ads boosts your social media visibility, helping connect with more users and offer more personalized services.
stack_html5_desc: HTML5 creates more interactive and accessible websites, improving the browsing experience from any device.
sobre_parrafo_1: Full-stack developer with over 7 years of experience building complete web applications. From the interface to the backend, every project is designed to deliver performance, scalability and a solid user experience.
sobre_parrafo_2: Committed to continuous learning and adopting industry best practices. Every solution I develop is backed by a methodical, results-oriented approach.
sobre_parrafo_3: I'm motivated by working with people who have a clear idea and need someone to make it real. If you have a project in mind, let's talk.
proyectos_subtitulo: A selection of work that represents my professional approach. Each project solves a specific need with the right technology.
proyecto_01_desc: Website for a gate workshop with integrated booking system.
proyecto_01_detalle: Website developed for a workshop specializing in gates and shutters. Includes an integrated booking system that lets clients schedule visits directly from the page. Data management is handled through Firebase, ensuring security and efficiency.
proyecto_02_desc: Digital services platform for Spanish-speaking markets.
proyecto_02_detalle: Web platform designed for a team of professionals offering digital marketing, graphic design and web development services. The site facilitates client-team connection, providing a modern, conversion-oriented experience.
proyecto_03_desc: Progressive app for comprehensive service company management.
proyecto_03_detalle: Progressive Web App developed for internal management of a service company. Manages clients, project statuses, scheduled visits, quote creation and internal notes. Supports multiple users and works offline thanks to PWA capabilities.
proyecto_04_desc: Website for lactation consultant with appointment scheduling and articles.
proyecto_04_detalle: Website for a lactation specialist. The platform offers video calls, appointment scheduling, informational articles and product recommendations. Designed to be accessible and clear, prioritizing the experience of mothers seeking professional guidance.
proyecto_05_desc: E-commerce platform with cart, payments and inventory management.
proyecto_05_detalle: Online sales platform focused on delivering a fast and secure shopping experience. Includes shopping cart, payment gateway integration and inventory management system. Optimized for mobile and desktop devices.

noticias_titular_01: The latest tech news of the week
noticias_titular_02: What's new in the Apple ecosystem and iOS development
noticias_titular_03: Updates on Android and mobile development
noticias_vacio: No news available at this time.

cta_subtitulo: Whether it's a new project, a technical question or a collaboration proposal — I'm available.
pagina_inicio_desc: Professional web development: custom sites, PWA apps and digital solutions with React, Firebase and the best technologies.

contacto_intro: Fill out the form or write me directly. I respond within 24 hours.
contacto_faq_01_pregunta: How long does a project take?
contacto_faq_01_respuesta: Timelines depend on each project's scope. Once we discuss your idea, I'll give you a realistic estimate and a clear work plan.
contacto_faq_02_pregunta: Do you work with international clients?
contacto_faq_02_respuesta: Yes, I work remotely with clients from anywhere in the world. Communication adapts to your timezone.
contacto_faq_03_pregunta: What do I need to get started?
contacto_faq_03_respuesta: Just a clear idea of what you need. Fill out the form and I'll schedule a call to define the details together.
sobre_pagina_bio_1: I'm a proactive, results-oriented developer with a strong commitment to continuous professional growth. I specialize in adopting modern technologies and applying industry best practices to build efficient and robust software solutions.
sobre_pagina_bio_2: I actively seek challenging projects where I can contribute my technical skills and collaborate on creating innovative solutions. My focus is on quality, continuous improvement and delivering results that exceed expectations.
sobre_pagina_timeline_sub: Education and projects throughout the years.

sobre_pagina_evento_01_desc: Full Stack Programming diploma focused on modern web development technologies.
sobre_pagina_evento_02_desc: Complete development of a digital marketing agency website, built with React.
sobre_pagina_evento_03_desc: React JS Web Development — Argentina Programa 4.0.
sobre_pagina_evento_04_desc: Progressive web app for a service company: client management, quotes and events with multi-user support. Built with React.
sobre_pagina_evento_06_desc: INTI training program focused on programming fundamentals.
sobre_pagina_evento_07_desc: Social Media Advertising & Ads — UTN Buenos Aires.
sobre_pagina_evento_08_desc: Google Ads — Advanced Search Advertising — UTN Buenos Aires.
sobre_pagina_evento_09_desc: Internet of Things Fundamentals Course — EducacionIT.

lab_pagina_subtitulo: Practical, free tools to solve everyday problems. Click any of them to try it out.
lab_pagina_h01_desc: Secure and customizable passwords. Choose length, character types and security level.
lab_pagina_h02_desc: Create QR codes from any link. Custom colors, transparent background, logo and PNG download.
lab_pagina_h03_desc: Convert audio files to MP3, WAV, AAC or OGG with real-time progress tracking.
lab_pagina_h04_desc: Convert, resize and compress images. Supports JPEG, PNG, WEBP and BMP.
lab_pagina_h05_desc: Generate a QR code so anyone can join your Wi-Fi network by scanning.
lab_pagina_h06_desc: Create harmonious color palettes. Lock the ones you like and generate new combinations.
lab_pagina_h07_desc: Resize images to the exact size for each social network. Instagram, Facebook, X, TikTok and more.
contacto_paso1_sub: Tell me a bit about yourself.
contacto_paso3_sub: A brief idea of what you have in mind.
contacto_campo_desc_ph: E.g.: I need a website for my architecture studio with a portfolio and contact form...
contacto_campo_plazo: Do you have a target timeline?
contacto_campo_plazo_ph: E.g.: By May, No rush, ASAP...
contacto_paso4_sub: Share links to websites or designs you like.
contacto_campo_ref_nota: What do you like about this site?
contacto_campo_ref_nota_ph: E.g.: The minimalist design, the colors...

contacto_como_contactar: How should I reach out to you?
contacto_exito_sub: Thanks for your interest. I'll get back to you shortly.
pagina_privacidad_desc: Privacy policy for stiancode.dev. How we collect, use and protect your personal information.
privacidad_intro: At S7ian Code, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting the personal data you share with us. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it and what your rights are.
privacidad_s1_texto: We only collect information that you voluntarily provide through our contact form: name, email address, project type, project description, estimated budget and preferred contact method. If you choose WhatsApp as your contact method, we also collect your phone number.
privacidad_s2_texto: We use the collected information exclusively to: respond to your inquiry, prepare project proposals, coordinate meetings and follow up on projects. We do not sell, rent or share your data with third parties.
privacidad_s3_texto: This site uses essential technical cookies for its operation (such as theme and language preferences stored in localStorage). We may use Google Analytics to understand site usage and improve the experience. Google Analytics collects anonymous visit information. If Google Ads campaigns are activated, conversion cookies may be used to measure advertising effectiveness.
privacidad_s4_texto: We may use the following third-party services that have their own privacy policies: Google Analytics (traffic analysis), Google Ads (advertising), Google Fonts (typography). We recommend reviewing each service privacy policy.
privacidad_s5_texto: We implement reasonable security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.
privacidad_s6_texto: You have the right to access, correct or request the deletion of your personal data at any time. To exercise these rights, contact us through our contact form or by email.
privacidad_s7_texto: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy. Any changes will be posted on this page with the corresponding update date.
privacidad_s8_texto: If you have questions about this privacy policy, you can contact us through our contact form or by sending an email.
pagina_terminos_desc: Terms and conditions of use for stiancode.dev.
terminos_intro: By accessing and using stiancode.dev, you accept the following terms and conditions. If you disagree with any of them, please do not use the site.
terminos_s1_texto: This website is intended to present S7ian Code web development services and facilitate contact with potential clients. The content is informational and does not constitute a binding contractual offer.
terminos_s2_texto: All content on this website — including text, designs, logos, icons, images and code — is owned by S7ian Code or used with proper authorization. Reproduction, distribution or use without prior written authorization is prohibited.
terminos_s3_texto: The services described on this site are informational in nature. Specific conditions for each project (scope, timelines, pricing) are defined individually through agreement between the parties before work begins.
terminos_s4_texto: The free tools in the Digital Lab are provided as is without warranty of any kind. S7ian Code is not responsible for results obtained with these tools.
terminos_s5_texto: This site may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the content or privacy policies of those sites.
terminos_s6_texto: S7ian Code is not liable for direct or indirect damages arising from the use of this website or the inability to access it.
terminos_s7_texto: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with the update date.
terminos_s8_texto: These terms are governed by the laws of the Argentine Republic. Any dispute shall be submitted to the jurisdiction of the ordinary courts of the Autonomous City of Buenos Aires.
lab_pass_info_segura: Readable password with dashes, like the ones generated by iOS or Google. Uses letters and numbers, ideal for most sites and apps.
lab_pass_info_pro: Full control: choose which character types to include, whether to use dash separators, and the exact length. For when a site has specific requirements.
lab_pass_info_ultra: Includes Unicode characters, mathematical symbols, Greek letters and special characters. Maximum entropy possible, but some sites may not accept all characters.
lab_paleta_hint: Press <kbd>Space</kbd> to generate · Click the HEX to copy
lab_rds_dropzone: Drop an image or click to upload
lab_rds_hint_reposicionar: Drag the image to reposition the crop
agendar_confirmar_nota: We'll send a confirmation email to reserve the day and time.
agendar_exito_nota: Check your inbox. You'll receive a confirmation with the meeting details and the video call link.
